creator: meritus@innervision.pl
text:
Port update

Fix: Please apply this patch:

PORTNAME=      Numbers_Words
-PORTVERSION=   0.16.2
+PORTVERSION=   0.16.4
 CATEGORIES=    textproc pear

 MAINTAINER=    meritus@innervision.pl


-The following languages are supported: bg (Bulgarian), cs (Czech), de (German),
-dk (Danish), ee (Estonian), en_100 (Donald Knuth system, English),
-en_GB (British English), en_US (American English), es (Spanish Castellano),
-es_AR (Argentinian Spanish), fr (French), fr_BE (French Belgium), he (Hebrew),
-hu_HU (Hungarian), id (Indonesian), it_IT (Italian), lt (Lithuanian),
-pl (Polish), pt_BR (Brazilian Portuguese), ru (Russian), sv (Swedish).
+The following languages are supported:
+* bg (Bulgarian)
+* cs (Czech)
+* de (German)
+* dk (Danish)
+* en_100 (Donald Knuth system, English)
+* en_GB (British English)
+* en_US (American English)
+* es (Spanish Castellano)
+* es_AR (Argentinian Spanish)
+* et (Estonian)
+* fr (French)
+* fr_BE (French Belgium)
+* he (Hebrew)
+* hu_HU (Hungarian)
+* id (Indonesian)
+* it_IT (Italian)
+* lt (Lithuanian)
+* nl (Dutch)
+* pl (Polish)
+* pt_BR (Brazilian Portuguese)
+* ru (Russian)
+* sv (Swedish)

 WWW: http://pear.php.net/package/Numbers_Words--2NTSt5amI7E0mO6mJYni9RuFJrj6aPOKp1Z4l2XvVFOZktc4
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN pear-Numbers_Words-OLD/Makefile pear-Numbers_Words/Makefile
--- pear-Numbers_Words-OLD/Makefile     2013-11-26 21:13:50.000000000 +0100
+++ pear-Numbers_Words/Makefile 2014-02-09 21:03:41.000000000 +0100
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/textproc/pear-Numbers_Words/Makefile 334871 2013-11-25 17:59:58Z antoine $
